items.claim: Hussein has a grappling threat that can force Gibson to engage and lead to a submission finish.
items.quote: possibility of him locking up a sub could end up being like a nice shot from Hussein. Forces Gibson to try enga to engage in the wrestling a bit and then Hussein ends up in dominant position locking in a strangle.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and has questions about how much is left in the tank.
items.quote: versus Gibson at 38. I don't know how much is left in the tank for a 38-year-old Cody Gibson.

items.claim: Narulo Aliev consistently wins by competitive decisions without doing a lot of damage or landing many takedowns.
items.quote: he squeaks by with these competitive decision wins every single time. He doesn't do a lot of damage. He doesn't land a whole lot of takedowns.

items.claim: Narulo Aliev was mounted at the end of his fight by Joe Solecki a year and a half ago.
items.quote: Was mounted, you know, at the end by Joe Selei a year and a half ago.

items.claim: Mike Davis has good Muay Thai, nasty elbows and knees in the clinch, and hard punches.
items.quote: Mike Davis that's got good Muay Thai, that's got nasty elbows and knees in the clinch, that can punch hard
